title: thugater #2364
definition:
1) a daughter
    1a) a daughter of God
        1a1) acceptable to God, rejoicing in God's peculiar care
             and protection
    1b) with the name of a place, city, or region
        1b1) denotes collectively all its inhabitants and citizens
    1c) a female descendant
